admission_policy.core_rule: Core symbols are the first option-history and live-scan proof set for the commodity lane.
admission_policy.conditional_rule: Conditional symbols remain scan eligible only when current contract liquidity, quote freshness, spread, volume, OI, event-risk, and concentration gates pass.
admission_policy.profitability_policy: Lane B profitability must be measured only against Lane B symbols and source-labeled exact bid/ask history.

tiers.label: Core Options Proxies
tiers.admission_rule: Primary commodity/power proxies selected for the first exact OPRA capture and replay loop.

tiers.label: Conditional Options Proxies
tiers.admission_rule: Secondary commodity and infrastructure proxies stay eligible only through strict per-contract liquidity gates.
